ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date and time when the order was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., Pending, Out for Delivery) */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product ordered */,
  "note" TEXT /* Additional notes regarding the order */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* The number of units of the product ordered */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* The total amount for the order (quantity * price) */,
  "discount" REAL /* Any discount applied to the order */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* The status of the payment (e.g., Paid, Pending, Failed) */,
  "shipping_status" TEXT /* The status of the shipping (e.g., Not Shipped, Shipped, Delivered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES order_statuses ("status_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* The billing or default address of the customer */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* The date the customer joined the platform */,
  "last_order_date" TEXT /* The date of the customer's last order */,
  "total_spent" REAL /* The total amount the customer has spent on the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "available_stock" INTEGER /* Number of items available in stock */,
  "category" TEXT /* The category of the product (e.g., Electronics, Clothing) */,
  "brand" TEXT /* The brand of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* A detailed description of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the product image */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the product (e.g., 4.5 out of 5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., Pending, Out for Delivery) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the status means */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the status was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, customer service) */,
  "email" TEXT /* The email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* The phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order that was changed */,
  "changed_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the change occurred */,
  "previous_status" TEXT /* Previous status of the order */,
  "new_status" TEXT /* New status of the order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "reason" TEXT /* The reason for the status change (e.g., Customer request, System update) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_history_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment record */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order associated with the payment */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount paid for the order */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the payment was made */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* The unique transaction ID from the payment gateway */,
  "card_type" TEXT /* The type of card used for payment (e.g., Visa, MasterCard) */,
  "card_last4" TEXT /* The last four digits of the card used for payment */,
  "refund_status" TEXT /* The status of any refunds (e.g., Not Refunded, Refunded) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping" (
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping record */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being shipped */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Address where the order will be shipped */,
  "shipping_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was shipped */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* The carrier used for shipping (e.g., UPS, FedEx) */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* The expected date of delivery */,
  "signature_required" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if a signature is required upon delivery */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* The cost of shipping for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)
